initiatives.name: Free Market Savannah
initiatives.description: A market where everything is free and a point of connection for our community! Join us in Daffin Park the second weekend of every month

initiatives.name: Hostess City Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Connecting our community through support and solidarity

initiatives.name: Savannah Artists for Weelaunne
initiatives.description: Savannah-based art collective in solidarity with the movement to Stop Cop Cities everywhere

initiatives.name: Trans Museums
initiatives.description: The Trans Museum is a pop-up, open venue concept with exhibition, gallery, performance and workshop space. The exhibits will be up for the month of October for Sav Pride.

initiatives.name: Migrant Equity
initiatives.description: Migrant Equity SouthEast is a Latinx and immigrant-led 501(c)(3) organization based in South Georgia. We're here to advocate for immigrant rights and work directly with the migrant and refugee communities of South Georgia to bring them equitable access to resources available to citizens
